org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals

Class Constants.AutoFeedforwardTuning

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.globals.Constants.AutoFeedforwardTuning
  • Enclosing class:
    Constants

    public static class Constants.AutoFeedforwardTuning
extends java.lang.Object
    Automatic feedforward tuning parameters. These constants control the automated feedforward tuning OpMode.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static double KS_MAX_POWER
      Maximum power to test for kS
      static double KS_POWER_INCREMENT
      Power increment step
      static double KS_VELOCITY_THRESHOLD
      Velocity threshold for kS detection (in/s)
      static int KV_SAMPLES_PER_LEVEL
      Samples per power level
      static double KV_STEADY_STATE_SAMPLES
      Samples to wait for steady state
      static double[] KV_TEST_POWERS
      Power levels to test for kV
